Johnson Controls File Protection Lp'S Notice Of Hearing On Request To Enter Default Judgment Against Alcor Electric, Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Alcor Electric Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jeffrey Flashman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Johnson Controls Fire Protection LP, fka Simplexgrinnell LP, a limited partnership.
Daniel Lyons, Fire Sales Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Flashman and Lyons appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Alcor Electric Inc., a California corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Written Contract, Breach of Oral Contract, Account Stated, Quantum Meruit, Unjust Enrichment and Statutory Liability was filed on April 28, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant
Alcor Electric Inc., a California corporation, occurred on September 10, 2020, and was effectuated on September 26, 2020.
Default was entered on October 27, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 12, 2020.

Plaintiff Johnson Controls Fire Protection submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Document entitled "Alcor Electric - Interest Calculation"..................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Johnson Controls Fire Protection LP, fka Simplexgrinnell LP, and against the defaulted defendant Alcor Electric Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,922.85.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,741.49.
Attorney Fees - $2,000.00.
Costs - $545.00.

Total - $49,209.34.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Continued To Mar-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
